summary: First-run end-to-end test of Junna Solar revamp (frontend + backend). All 11 backend pytest cases pass (estimate, leads CRUD, SEO assets, validation). Frontend flows verified: home loads, all 7 nav links route correctly, savings estimator validates + calls /api/estimate, lead form 3-step validates and POSTs to /api/leads (success screen shown), FAQ accordion toggles, case study filters work (All/Home/Business shown), mobile sticky CTA visible only <1024px with proper wa.me + tel: hrefs. No runtime errors detected.
action_items: Pre-launch content: BRAND phone is placeholder '+91XXXXXXXXXX' (tel: + wa.me URLs use it); replace with real number before go-live (already TODO-noted in Contact.jsx).
Pre-launch content: Trust & Certificates page shows placeholder cert numbers ('IS 14286 / IS 16170', 'CIN: TODO', 'GSTIN: TODO') — replace with real values.
Optional hardening: backend POST /api/estimate accepts string monthly_bill via float coercion only when valid; non-numeric strings would raise 422 (acceptable). No fix required.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is configured AFTER it is first referenced inside create_lead via module-level logger= line at bottom; in practice this works because logger is reassigned at import time before any request, but the basicConfig + getLogger call should be moved to the top of the module for clarity.

server.py: leads.created_at is stored as ISO string but the response_model=Lead expects datetime, so list_leads has to re-parse. Storing as a native BSON datetime would simplify and remove the try/except fallback.
LeadForm.jsx step 1 validation accepts monthly_bill='0' (isNaN check only). Consider requiring > 0 to match backend rule, though backend isn't called at step 1.
MobileStickyCTA overlaps page content with no bottom padding spacer on mobile — long pages still scroll fine, but consider adding pb-20 on Layout main when sticky is visible.
test_credentials: None — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test leads via API (TEST_Hyderabad/TEST_User and TEST_Mumbai/TEST_Minimal) plus 1 via UI flow (TEST_AutoUser). All prefixed with TEST_ for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 3 endpoints (/api/leads CRUD, /api/estimate happy + 400 paths, robots/sitemap, MongoDB _id exclusion). Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. Mobile sticky CTA hidden ≥1024px; test at 390x844 viewport. Lead form 3-step: step1 needs city+bill, step2 needs name+10-digit phone (email optional but validated if present), step3 has optional upload/callback/notes then submit. Case studies has 6 total cards across types Home(2)/Business(2)/Society(1)/Institution(1).
